input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('market.csv')
qids = ['144493', '244043', '757234', '50504', '655411', '668257']
for qid in qids:
    row = df[df['qid'].astype(str) == str(qid)]
    if len(row) > 0:
        r = row.iloc[0]
        print(f'Q{r[\"qid\"]}: {r[\"title\"][:120]} | Market: {r[\"market_aggregate\"]}')
"
